before:
Include your API key in the `X-API-Token` header on every request:

```bash
curl https://api.example.com/v1/users \
  -H "X-API-Token: your_api_key_here"
```
after:
Include your API key as a bearer token in the `Authorization` header on every request:

```bash
curl https://api.example.com/v1/users \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer your_api_key_here"
```
rationale: The authenticate() handler now reads req.headers.authorization and expects a 'Bearer ' prefix. The X-API-Token header is no longer accepted.
